title: dulacia pohliana
intro: Dulacia pohliana, also known as the Poisonberry or Red Mangleberry, is a species of flowering plant in the family Rhamnaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Dulacia pohliana include reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating various skin conditions. Dulacia pohliana can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or extracts, and is also used in folk medicine to treat various ailments, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy.
